---
name: Course content proposal
about: Creation and consolidation of course content.
title: "[Content] Short descriptive title"
labels: course core
assignees: matib12

---

## Type of contribution

Select one or more:

- [ ] Example code
- [ ] Exercise for students
- [ ] Demonstration or experiment
- [ ] Concept explanation
- [ ] Performance optimization example
- [ ] Container / reproducibility example
- [ ] CI/CD example
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## Related lecture or topic

Which lecture or course topic does this relate to?

Examples:
- Programming languages spectrum
- Versioning with git
- Virtualization / Docker
- Optimization and profiling
- Continuous integration
- GPU / FPGA acceleration
- High-Throughput Computing

---

## Motivation

Why should this content be added?

Explain:
- the scientific relevance
- the programming concept illustrated
- why it is useful for students.

---

## Proposed content

Describe the material you propose.

Examples:
- slides
- code example
- exercise description
- dataset
- benchmark
- experiment or demonstration.

---

## Expected learning outcome

After working with this material, students should be able to:

- understand …
- implement …
- measure …

---

## Implementation details

If applicable include:

- programming language
- libraries
- container requirements
- HPC resources
- datasets
- expected runtime

---

## Additional resources

Links to:

- papers
- tutorials
- repositories
- documentation.

---

## Possible follow-up tasks

What additional improvements or extensions could be developed?
